demo.title: Buy a band token
demo.code:
buy $EBM with 10 USDC

-> mints 10 Money (Money for Trees) 1:1 from your USDC,
   then swaps that Money for EBM through the band's Uniswap V3 wall.
You end up holding EBM band tokens.

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured
Fund your Bankr wallet with USDC on Base
Enable arbitrary contract calls (Bankr Security -> keep 'Disable arbitrary contract calls' OFF)
Buy: say `buy $EBM with 10 USDC` (or any band symbol + USDC amount)
